Description: Summon forth your mehwapyarra. As dutiful as it is laidback.
Summon forth your mehwapyarra. As dutiful as it is laid-back.
Summon forth your monowheel S1, a bold vehicle fit for a champion of the Arcadion.
Description{Enhanced}: A prize Ascension Arcadia bestows upon its champions, this unique one-wheeled vehicle employs an advanced stability system that allows it to traverse any and all terrain. Owing to its complex controls, however, it takes considerable practice to become a competent rider.
Tooltip:
Without further ado, let us
set the wheels in motion!
   - Lady Luck

Description: Summon forth your qeziigural, a winged golem whose name means “gold that flies” in the Mamool Ja tongue.
Description{Enhanced}: Encountered in Cenote Ja Ja Gural, this winged stone construct is outfitted with golden adornments whose engravings bespeak Mamool Ja origins. As its bare body appears to hail from an earlier time, however, it is believed to be a Yok Huy relic that was repurposed and decorated.
Tooltip:
Don't indulge them with anything
but a face of stony indifference.
   - Papa Gruff
